spots.name: Kozjak Waterfall
spots.blurb: 15 m fall in a cathedral-like cave chamber near Kobarid. 25–30 min walk from the Napoleon Bridge.

spots.name: Boka Waterfall
spots.blurb: At 144 m, the highest waterfall in Slovenia. Thunderous at snowmelt; viewable from the road bridge.

spots.name: Virje Waterfall
spots.blurb: Wide, gentle fall into a turquoise pool near Bovec. Short, easy access.

spots.name: Source of the Soča (Izvir Soče)
spots.blurb: Where the river begins — a karst spring at ~990 m below Mt Travnik. Final approach is a steep, cabled scramble.

spots.name: Tolmin Gorge
spots.blurb: The lowest point of Triglav National Park. Devil's Bridge, Bear's Head and the Thermal Spring (20 °C, not for bathing).

spots.name: Velika korita (Great Gorge of the Soča)
spots.blurb: Up to 15 m deep, 750 m long emerald canyon near Lepena. Footbridges and viewpoints.

spots.name: Napoleon Bridge pools (Kobarid)
spots.blurb: Iconic stone bridge over deep emerald water. Cold year-round — limestone rock flour gives the colour.

spots.name: Otona / Trnovo pools
spots.blurb: Calmer reservoir-fed stretches popular for a summer swim. Always check current and depth first.

spots.name: Kobarid Museum
spots.blurb: Award-winning museum on the 1917 Battle of Caporetto (Isonzo Front). Start here before the trails.

spots.name: Italian Charnel House (Kobarid)
spots.blurb: Octagonal ossuary on Gradič hill holding the remains of over 7,000 Italian soldiers.

spots.name: Kolovrat Outdoor Museum
spots.blurb: Restored ridge-top trenches and tunnels with sweeping views into Italy. Often empty.

spots.name: Mangart Saddle
spots.blurb: The highest road in Slovenia (~2,055 m). Toll road; alpine panorama over the Julian Alps.

spots.name: Vršič Pass
spots.blurb: Slovenia's highest mountain pass (1,611 m), 50 hairpins, the Russian Chapel on the north side.
